name: MILK OF CALCIUM BILE
definition: LIMY BILE = CALCIUM SOAP precipitation of particulate material with high concentration of calcium carbonate, calcium

demographics.Associated with: chronic cholecystitis + gallstone obstruction of cystic duct

distribution: diffuse opacification of GB lumen with dependent layering
discriminating_features: diffuse opacification of GB lumen with dependent layering
usually functionless GB on oral cholecystogram

general: diffuse opacification of GB lumen with dependent layering
usually functionless GB on oral cholecystogram
